description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named crossbuild that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has two jobs: build and release. The build job runs on ubuntu-24.04 with a matrix strategy for win32 and win64, checking out the code, setting up ccache, installing dependencies, setting up Python 3.12, installing Python dependencies, building, testing, and archiving artifacts. The release job depends on build, runs on ubuntu-24.04 only for tags, downloads artifacts, renames them, checks for a release, and populates it with artifacts.
